title: Sorting Algorithms, Stability, and Ordering Contracts
description: Order customer records by multiple keys while preserving meaningful prior order. Learners cumulatively produce a sorting laboratory with operation counts through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Define total, partial, and key-based orderings including tie and missing-value policy.
Trace insertion and selection sorting invariants and identify useful input regimes.
Implement stable merge sort and account for auxiliary space and copying.
